arts.ttl: Atletico de Madrid vs Real Madrid 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Both Real Madrid and Atletico want to compete for the 2024-25 Liga title, so tonight’s Derby represents a good opportunity for them to cut Barcelona’s lead in the table. Real Madrid the Estadio Metropolitano to face Atletico de Madrid in what’s expected to be a thrilling Derby.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti issues stern warning to Real Madrid players ahead of derby showdown
arts.sum: Real Madrid make the trip to city rivals Atletico Madrid on Sunday evening, and the Metropolitano match-up promises to be a fiery one. For Carlo Ancelotti, this is not good news, following recent events. So far this season, Los Blancos players have been shown nine yellow cards for dissent – the most in La Liga. arts.ttl: Atlético vs Real Madrid: which team is most valuable?
arts.sum: This financial investment extends beyond the starting lineup, with key players like Alexander Sørloth ($35.8 million) and Nahuel Molina ($24.6 million) on the bench, further highlighting the depth and ambition of Atlético’s squad this season. While Real Madrid is undoubtedly ahead in that aspect, Atlético Madrid is not far behind, as evidenced by their numerous summer signings (Julián Álvarez, Alexander Sørloth, Robin Le Normand, and Conor Gallagher, among others).

arts.ttl: Atletico de Madrid vs Real Madrid, 2024 LaLiga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Atletico de Madrid’s Estadio Metropolitano for a crucial Madrid Derby after Barcelona’s 4-2 defeat against Osasuna on Saturday night. Kylian Mbappe is not available and coach Carlo Ancelotti will be expected to deploy four midfielders in his starting XI.
